name: kaseya-spanning-backup-mcp
description: MCP server for Kaseya Spanning Backup — SaaS backup for Microsoft 365, Google Workspace, and Salesforce.
long_description: Provides AI assistants with structured access to Kaseya Spanning Backup. Manage backed-up users, inspect per-user services, list daily backup runs, queue and poll restores, search the audit log, and view license/seat usage across M365, Google Workspace, and Salesforce platforms. Authentication uses Spanning HTTP Basic auth (admin email + API token, pair-bound).

spanning_admin_email.title: Spanning Admin Email
spanning_admin_email.description: The admin email the Spanning API token is bound to. Both must match what was issued in the Spanning admin console.

spanning_api_token.title: Spanning API Token
spanning_api_token.description: API token issued from the Spanning admin console. Pair-bound to the admin email; any mismatch surfaces as a generic 401.

spanning_platform.title: Spanning Platform
spanning_platform.description: Which Spanning product the token targets: m365 (Microsoft 365), gws (Google Workspace), or salesforce. Tokens cannot cross platforms. Default: m365.

spanning_api_url.title: Spanning API Base URL (override)
spanning_api_url.description: Optional. Override the API base URL — only needed for staging shards. When unset, the URL is derived from spanning_platform.
